parallel_batches.description: Core internal/config changes - toml tags + writer.go (same package, one agent to avoid conflicts)

tasks.description: Phase 1+2: Add toml struct tags to internal/config/config.go AND create internal/config/writer.go with WriteDefault, Set, Check, GetValue, parseConfigValue, atomicWrite, newViperForFile

parallel_batches.description: All cmd/config refactors in parallel (independent files) + delete unset + flag binding

tasks.description: Phase 3: Refactor cmd/config/init.go to use config.WriteDefault
Phase 4: Refactor cmd/config/set.go to use config.Set - remove updateConfigValue function
Phase 5: DELETE cmd/config/unset.go and cmd/config/unset_test.go. Remove unset subcommand registration from cmd/config/config.go
Phase 6: Refactor cmd/config/check.go to use config.Check instead of loadConfigFile
Phase 7: Refactor cmd/config/get.go to use config.GetValue instead of getConfigValue
Phase 10: Add bindFlagsToConfig to cmd/root.go initConfig to apply --db, --as, --json, --quiet overrides onto *Config struct after loading

parallel_batches.description: Cleanup helpers.go after all callers updated

tasks.description: Phase 8: Clean up cmd/config/helpers.go - remove atomicWrite, marshalConfigWithComments, getConfigValue, setValueInMap, unsetValueInMap, loadConfigFile, determineConfigPath, configFilePerms, keyValueParts. Keep: cmdFS, SetFilesystem, fileExists, ensureDir
Phase 9: Create internal/config/writer_test.go with programmatic round-trip tests for WriteDefault, Set, Check, GetValue. No golden files. All 15 test cases from the plan.
